name: ddl-idempotent
description: DEFERRED: Part of migration strategy, not yet fully spec'd. Original: Add IF NOT EXISTS to DDL generator.
acceptanceCriteria: generateSQL() accepts optional options parameter with ifNotExists?: boolean
When ifNotExists=true, CREATE TABLE statements include IF NOT EXISTS clause
Both Postgres and SQLite dialects support IF NOT EXISTS syntax
Default behavior (ifNotExists=false) unchanged for backward compatibility
generateSQLIdempotent() convenience function wraps generateSQL with ifNotExists=true
Unit tests verify IF NOT EXISTS clause in generated DDL
